FOLDER.NAME: infa_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Informatica PowerCenter project folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Veretta Schnackenberg

MAPPLET.DESCRIPTION: Calculates MD5 Hash by concatenating 200 columns. Puts 'col_n' for NULL values, where n = 1,2,3,4..200
MAPPLET.NAME: mplt_MD5_200

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Calculates MD5 hash which is always 32 characters
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_MD5

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: MD5( in_COL_1 || in_COL_2 || in_COL_3 || in_COL_4 || in_COL_5 || in_COL_6 || in_COL_7 || in_COL_8 || in_COL_9 || in_COL_10 || in_COL_11 || in_COL_12 || in_COL_13 || in_COL_14 || in_COL_15 || in_COL_16 || in_COL_17 || in_COL_18 || in_COL_19 || in_COL_20 || in_COL_21 || in_COL_22 || in_COL_23 || in_COL_24 || in_COL_25 || in_COL_26 || in_COL_27 || in_COL_28 || in_COL_29 || in_COL_30 || in_COL_31 || in_COL_32 || in_COL_33 || in_COL_34 || in_COL_35 || in_COL_36 || in_COL_37 || in_COL_38 || in_COL_39 || in_COL_40 || in_COL_41 || in_COL_42 || in_COL_43 || in_COL_44 || in_COL_45 || in_COL_46 || in_COL_47 || in_COL_48 || in_COL_49 || in_COL_50 ||in_COL_51 ||in_COL_52 ||in_COL_53 ||in_COL_54 ||in_COL_55 ||in_COL_56 ||in_COL_57 ||in_COL_58 ||in_COL_59 ||in_COL_60 ||in_COL_61 ||in_COL_62 ||in_COL_63 ||in_COL_64 ||in_COL_65 ||in_COL_66 ||in_COL_67 ||in_COL_68 ||in_COL_69 ||in_COL_70 ||in_COL_71 ||in_COL_72 ||in_COL_73 ||in_COL_74 ||in_COL_75 ||in_COL_76 ||in_COL_77 ||in_COL_78 ||in_COL_79 ||in_COL_80 ||in_COL_81 ||in_COL_82 ||in_COL_83 ||in_COL_84 ||in_COL_85 ||in_COL_86 ||in_COL_87 ||in_COL_88 ||in_COL_89 ||in_COL_90 ||in_COL_91 ||in_COL_92 ||in_COL_93 ||in_COL_94 ||in_COL_95 ||in_COL_96 ||in_COL_97 ||in_COL_98 ||in_COL_99 ||in_COL_100 ||in_COL_101 ||in_COL_102 ||in_COL_103 ||in_COL_104 ||in_COL_105 ||in_COL_106 ||in_COL_107 ||in_COL_108 ||in_COL_109 ||in_COL_110 ||in_COL_111 ||in_COL_112 ||in_COL_113 ||in_COL_114 ||in_COL_115 ||in_COL_116 ||in_COL_117 ||in_COL_118 ||in_COL_119 ||in_COL_120 ||in_COL_121 ||in_COL_122 ||in_COL_123 ||in_COL_124 ||in_COL_125 ||in_COL_126 ||in_COL_127 ||in_COL_128 ||in_COL_129 ||in_COL_130 ||in_COL_131 ||in_COL_132 ||in_COL_133 ||in_COL_134 ||in_COL_135 ||in_COL_136 ||in_COL_137 ||in_COL_138 ||in_COL_139 ||in_COL_140 ||in_COL_141 ||in_COL_142 ||in_COL_143 ||in_COL_144 ||in_COL_145 ||in_COL_146 ||in_COL_147 ||in_COL_148 ||in_COL_149 ||in_COL_150 ||in_COL_151 ||in_COL_152 ||in_COL_153 ||in_COL_154 ||in_COL_155 ||in_COL_156 ||in_COL_157 ||in_COL_158 ||in_COL_159 ||in_COL_160 ||in_COL_161 ||in_COL_162 ||in_COL_163 ||in_COL_164 ||in_COL_165 ||in_COL_166 ||in_COL_167 ||in_COL_168 ||in_COL_169 ||in_COL_170 ||in_COL_171 ||in_COL_172 ||in_COL_173 ||in_COL_174 ||in_COL_175 ||in_COL_176 ||in_COL_177 ||in_COL_178 ||in_COL_179 ||in_COL_180 ||in_COL_181 ||in_COL_182 ||in_COL_183 ||in_COL_184 ||in_COL_185 ||in_COL_186 ||in_COL_187 ||in_COL_188 ||in_COL_189 ||in_COL_190 ||in_COL_191 ||in_COL_192 ||in_COL_193 ||in_COL_194 ||in_COL_195 ||in_COL_196 ||in_COL_197 ||in_COL_198 ||in_COL_199 ||in_COL_200 )
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: out_MD5

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Calculates MD5 Hash by concatenating 200 columns. Puts 'col_n' for NULL values, where n = 1,2,3,4..200
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: mplt_MD5_200

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Calculates MD5 hash which is always 32 characters
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_MD5

FOLDER.NAME: di_project
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Neuron Data Integration Project Folder Primary: Rohit Shukla Secondary: Atif Usman

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to archive files. Read the command documentation for more information.
TASK.NAME: cmd_archive_file

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to copy files from one location to another. After copying it will archive source files and create .list file if more than 1 file is copied. Read the command documentation for more information.
TASK.NAME: cmd_copy_file

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

EXPRMACRO.DESCRIPTION:
i Developer:Sindhuja M Date: 14-June-2024
Description:The user defined function is used to convert incoming Boolean value to
String value of soft delete flag in DIH.
1. 1 will bereplaced by 'X'
2. 0 will be replaced by null
EXPRMACRO.NAME: udf_DI_Boolean_String_Conv
EXPRMACRO.PROTOTYPE: NSTRING udf_DI_Boolean_String_Conv( Boolean as small integer )

EXPRMACRO.DESCRIPTION: Developer:Anubhuti Jha Date: 17-MAY-2024 Description:The user defined function is used to convert incoming Boolean value to String value of soft delete flag in DIH. 1. 1 will bereplaced by 'X' 2. 0 will be replaced by null
EXPRMACRO.NAME: udf_Boolean_String_Soft_Delete
EXPRMACRO.PROTOTYPE: NSTRING udf_Boolean_String_Soft_Delete( Boolean as small integer )

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: look up condition for MTRL MASTER
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: lkp_MTRL_MASTER

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Pass through expression to Insert records and to add ETL_LOAD_DT.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_INSERT

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Passthrough Expression fto calculate Insert/Update flag
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_Insert_Update_Flag

GROUP.DESCRIPTION: Path for the data when none of the group conditions are satisfied.
GROUP.NAME: DEFAULT1

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Pass through expression to Update records and to add ETL_LOAD_DT.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_UPDATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Validate XML Source
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: Validate only if DTD/Schema is present

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Calculates MD5 Hash by concatenating columns.
INSTANCE.NAME: Shortcut_to_mplt_MD5_200

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Calculates MD5 Hash by concatenating columns.
INSTANCE.NAME: Shortcut_to_mplt_MD5_2001

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: look up condition for MTRL MASTER
INSTANCE.NAME: lkp_MTRL_MASTER

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Pass through expression to Insert records and to add ETL_LOAD_DT.
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_INSERT

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Passthrough Expression fto calculate Insert/Update flag
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_Insert_Update_Flag

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Pass through expression to Update records and to add ETL_LOAD_DT.
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_UPDATE

SHORTCUT.COMMENTS: Calculates MD5 Hash by concatenating 200 columns. Puts 'col_n' for NULL values, where n = 1,2,3,4..200
SHORTCUT.NAME: Shortcut_to_mplt_MD5_200

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to initiate ETL load process. FOR USE AS A PRE-SESSION COMMAND.
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_start

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to end ETL load process. FOR USE AS POST-SESSION SUCCESS COMMAND
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_end

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to end ETL load process. FOR USE AS POST-SESSION FAILURE COMMAND
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_end_fail

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails

SESSION.DESCRIPTION: The session loads Material Master table
SESSION.NAME: s_m_DI_ITEM_MTRL_MASTER

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TASKINSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: The session loads Material Master table
TASKINSTANCE.NAME: s_m_DI_ITEM_MTRL_MASTER

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_copy_file.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_copy_file.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_copy_file.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_LIST_file.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_LIST_file.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_LIST_file.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_archive_file.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_archive_file.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_archive_file.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_DI_ITEM_MTRL_MASTER.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_DI_ITEM_MTRL_MASTER.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: di_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Neuron Data Integration Shared Folder Primary: Rohit Shukla Secondary: Atif Usman

FOLDER.NAME: md_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Neuron Master Data Shared Folder Primary: Rohit Shukla Secondary: Atif Usman

XMLTEXT.TEXT: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <METASCHEMA ORIGIN="schema,reposit" version="7.01"> <NAMESPACEINFO NAMESPACE="" PREFIX="" ELEMENT-FORM-DEFAULT="unqualified" ATTRIBUTE-FORM-DEFAULT="unqualified" ROOTNAMESPACE="true"> </NAMESPACEINFO> </METASCHEMA>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:infatype="http://www.informatica.com/types/" elementFormDefault="unqualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified"> <xsd:element name="A_Product"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="A_ProductType" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Product"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="40"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ProductType" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="CrossPlantStatus" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="2"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="CrossPlantStatusValidityDate" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:dateTime"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="CreationDate" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:dateTime"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="CreatedByUser" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="12"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="LastChangeDate" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:dateTime"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="LastChangedByUser" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="12"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="LastChangeDateTime" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:dateTime"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="IsMarkedForDeletion" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:boolean"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ProductOldID" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="40"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="GrossWeight" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:decimal"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="3"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="SourceOfSupply" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="1"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="WeightUnit" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="3"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="NetWeight" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:decimal"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="CountryOfOrigin" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="3"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="CompetitorID" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="10"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ProductGroup" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="9"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="BaseUnit" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="3"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ItemCategoryGroup" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ProductHierarchy" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="18"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Division" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="2"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="VarblPurOrdUnitIsActive" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="1"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="VolumeUnit" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="3"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="MaterialVolume" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:decimal"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ANPCode" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="9"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Brand" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ProcurementRule" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="1"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ValidityStartDate" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:dateTime"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="LowLevelCode" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="3"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ProdNoInGenProdInPrepackProd" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="40"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="SerialIdentifierAssgmtProfile" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="SizeOrDimensionText" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="32"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="IndustryStandardName" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="18"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ProductStandardID" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="18"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="InternationalArticleNumberCat" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="2"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ProductIsConfigurable" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:boolean"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="IsBatchManagementRequired" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:boolean"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ExternalProductGroup" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="18"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="CrossPlantConfigurableProduct" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="40"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="SerialNoExplicitnessLevel" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="1"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ProductManufacturerNumber" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="40"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ManufacturerNumber" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="10"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ManufacturerPartProfile" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="QltyMgmtInProcmtIsActive" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:boolean"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="IndustrySector" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="1"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="ChangeNumber" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="12"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="MaterialRevisionLevel" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="2"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="HandlingIndicator" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="WarehouseProductGroup" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="WarehouseStorageCondition" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="2"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="StandardHandlingUnitType" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="SerialNumberProfile" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="AdjustmentProfile" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="3"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="PreferredUnitOfMeasure" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="3"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="IsPilferable" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:boolean"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="IsRelevantForHzdsSubstances" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:boolean"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="QuarantinePeriod" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:decimal"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="TimeUnitForQuarantinePeriod" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="3"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="QualityInspectionGroup" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="AuthorizationGroup" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="HandlingUnitType" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="4"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="HasVariableTareWeight" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:boolean"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="MaximumPackagingLength" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:decimal"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="MaximumPackagingWidth" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:decimal"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="MaximumPackagingHeight" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xsd:decimal"> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="UnitForMaxPackagingDimensions" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="3"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="PurchngValKey" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"> <xsd:simpleType> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element>
</xsd:schema>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <METATABLE version="7.01"> <GROUP GROUPNAME="X_A_Product"> <GROUPSAT>A_Product</GROUPSAT> </GROUP> <GROUP GROUPNAME="X_A_ProductType"> <GROUPSAT>A_Product/A_ProductType</GROUPSAT> <COLUMN COLUMN_NAME="FK_A_Product" RELATIONSHIP="hierarchy"/> </GROUP> <GROUP GROUPNAME="X_to_Description"> <GROUPSAT>A_Product/A_ProductType/to_Description</GROUPSAT> <COLUMN COLUMN_NAME="FK_A_ProductType" RELATIONSHIP="hierarchy"/> </GROUP> <GROUP GROUPNAME="X_A_ProductDescriptionType"> <GROUPSAT>A_Product/A_ProductType/to_Description/A_ProductDescriptionType</GROUPSAT> <COLUMN COLUMN_NAME="FK_to_Description" RELATIONSHIP="hierarchy"/> </GROUP> </METATABLE>

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Add Currently Processed XML File Name Port
